\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item This version has been incubated on gitlab Arc\+Geo\+Sim-\/framework.
\item The principal modification is the creation of the Arc\+Geo\+Sim and Arc\+Geo\+SimR libraries
\item Creation of the CICD pipeline. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
